releases.description: Breaking change: remove dynamic blocks as obsidian prevent plugins from executing arbitrary code.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description: update manifest.json

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Add scheduled items to "today" bucket rather than "Overdue"

Matching changes from (https://github.com/orgzly-revived/orgzly-android-revived/pull/856

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description: # Dynamic blocks - Implement dynamic blocks that execute custom javascript functions. Example of displaying the date with a dynamic block in an orgmode file: ```org #+BEGIN: getDate #+END: ``` Rendered: The function needs to be defined in the javascript definition file: ```javascript function getDate() { return new Date().toISOString() } ``` - New plugin setting "Dynamic block javascript definition file"

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description: # Org agenda An agenda view for orgmode tasks with `ad.DAYS`. ````markdown ```orgmode-tasks filepath: somefolder/somefile.org query: ad.7 ``` ```` The query can also includes other filters and sorting like the regular orgzly search. # Calendar support by orgzly revived [Orgzly revived](https://www.orgzlyrevived.com/) syncs orgmode SCHEDULED and DEADLINE as calendar events (https://github.com/orgzly-revived/orgzly-android-revived/pull/834). Really useful if you use obsidian-orgmode-cm6 on mobile or synchronize your desktop files to mobile.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# orgmode-tasks block sorting

You can now sort tasks with the [orgzly syntax](https://www.orgzly.com/docs#search-sorting)

- by scheduled date (`o.scheduled`)
- by deadline date (`o.deadline`)
- by closed date (`o.closed`)
- by priority (`o.priority`)
- by status (`o.state`)

Priority is taken into account by default.
If `s` or `d` are used in the query, they are also sorted by scheduled or deadline time.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Link autocompletion

Look up the files and org id when starting to type a link with `[[` or `[[id:`

![2025-04-05_15-10](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/72e271fa-6897-470d-bdfa-a32424413749)

![2025-04-05_15-09](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b2979acd-d765-4c9a-a188-0fe690f193ba)

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Orgzly search

Implement orgzly search to display orgmode headings in markdown files.

For example this block
````
```orgmode-tasks
filepath: Orgmode/Orgmode file.org
query: .i.canceled  # everything not canceled
```
````
Will read the file `Orgmode/Orgmode file.org` and display every heading that don't have the keyword `CANCELED` (the query will fail if you don't have `CANCELED` in your keywords from the plugin settings).

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/0c52ac43-550f-44ba-8bd8-2d9e67c73b24)

Other queries include
- `query: it.todo` every tasks with a todo keyword
- `query: s.today` tasks with a scheduled date lesser than or equal to today
- `query: ` leaving blank means every headings

See https://www.orgzly.com/docs#search for the syntax, currently only s, d, c, i, it are implemented.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Code blocks

- Source block highlighting
- Languages supported: c, c++, css, html, java, javascript, json, php, python, rust, sass, xml

This text
```
#+begin_src javascript
const block = "highlighted"
#+end_src
```
becomes
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f1ad9910-203d-41a4-968f-457555e2d39f)

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Heading parsing improvements

- Headings with only a keyword are correctly parsed
- Tags starting with a space are not parsed as Tags anymore

Thanks @sahilkmishra for reporting it.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Fix some "failed to open" edge cases on android

- sort codemirror decorations
- more precise parsing for blocks

Thanks @sahilkmishra for reporting the error.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Edge cases for fonts and heading CSS

- Use the fonts from the obsidian `Settings > Appearance > Font` in org views, even with default theme
- Always add org-heading-x css classes, even when selected

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Convenient CSS for heading levels

- Add plugin option to hide heading stars, to allow to replace them with CSS
- Stop nesting `org-heading-x` CSS classes, to simplify selectors:
  - Heading lines of level x can be targeted with `.org-heading.org-heading-x`
  - Heading lines + sections at level x can be targeted with `org-heading-x`.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Fonts and CSS for heading levels

- Use the fonts from the obsidian `Settings > Appearance > Font` in org views
- Add css classes for heading levels: org-heading-1 org-heading-2 etc...

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Blocks and papercuts

- implement lesser Blocks (COMMENT EXAMPLE EXPORT SRC VERSE) with unformatted content
- handle link/markup deep nesting
- more precise parsing of planning lines (only `SCHEDULED:` is highlighted)

![2024-07-23_07-59](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/402d1f53-8623-45a3-a509-27d5b04c5561)


- live preview takes into account the entire selection and not only the cursor

![2024-07-23_07-59_1](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b69165cb-da5d-415c-9fd2-16279bb68df0)

- more restrictive definition of comment (`#x` not parsed as a comment anymore)
- autodetect instantly when Vim setting is changed in obsidian
- update README.md to show the org syntax support

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# More links and markup

- markup in links
- links in markup
- inline links

![2024-07-14_16-57](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6dca494f-e9f0-4037-b88d-35754dc31058)

(2.4.1 contains the changes of tag 2.4.0 who was doesn't have its own release since some features were not completely implemented)

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Link to `:ID:`

- The id links like `[[id:customid]]` will now redirect to the .org file containing a property drawer with the id like
```
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: customid
:END:
```
The cursor will be at the top of the file if the id is set on the file, or at the start of the heading if the id is set on a heading.

- Links inside a heading are now parsed

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Small improvements

- Implement Property Drawer folding
- Increase the hovering area where the fold icon is visible on desktop
- Prevent creating todo keywords containing newlines or trailing spaces

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Bug Fix

Vim mode was auto-enabled by mistake. Orgmode files can now be edited like the other files (following the obsidian vim settings).

Thank you @jackbaty for opening an issue about it.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Live Preview

- Links support, with live preview
  - External links: `[[https://github.com]]`
  - Internal links to files inside the vault: `[[file.org]]`
  - Inline images inside the vault by checking the file extension: `[[image.png]]` 
  - Links with a description: `[[https://orgmode.org][Orgmode]]`
  - Plain links and angle links: `https://example.com`, `<https://example.com>`
- Live preview for text markup: `*bold*`

https://github.com/BBazard/obsidian-orgmode-cm6/assets/10139245/bec0c1e6-2da6-4c43-983d-f84bd660119a

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Text Markup Support

The text markup parsing can effortlessly span hundreds of lines.

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# What's Changed

- The plugin now works on android and iOS
- The undocumented exposed variables `global.todoKeywords` and `global.doneKeywords` are removed
- The orgmode files are now auto-saved
- Experimental CodeBlockProcessor to see orgmode tasks in markdown files

https://github.com/BBazard/obsidian-orgmode-cm6/assets/10139245/b071b2c8-b56e-4050-8fcf-02a922fdd1c0

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# Bug fix

- fix a bug where the content of an orgmode file would be inserted at the end of another orgmode file when switching between them
- remove the black outline surrounding the file content in light mode when the view was focused
- add package-lock.json

releases.author: BBazard
releases.description:
# What's Changed

- Extend the folding of headers to include their nested headers
- Match colors of cursor and selection to the accent color
- Handle more edge cases in the syntax grammar concerning newlines
